+-----------+
|  Input 1  ++
+-----------+|
             |  +-------------+
             +->|  Process 1  ++
             |  +-------------+|
             |                 |
+-----------+|                 |
|  Input 2  ++                 |
+-----------+                  |
                               |                                    +---------------+  +------------+
                               |                                +-->|  Transform 1  +->|  Output 1  ++
                               |                                |   +---------------+  +------------+|
                +-------------+|  +-----------+  +------------+ |                                    |
+-----------++->|  Process 2  ++->|  Merge 1  +->|  Filter 1  +-+                                    |
|  Input 3  ++  +-------------+   +-----------+  +------------+ |                                    |
+-----------+|                                                  |                                    |
             |                                                  |   +---------------+  +------------+|
             |                                                  +-->|  Transform 2  +->|  Output 2  ++
             |                                                      +---------------+  +------------+|
             |                                                                                       |
+-----------+|                                                                                       |
|  Input 4  ++                                                                                       |
+-----------+                                                                                        |
                                                                                                     |
                                                                                                     |
                                                                                                     |
                                                                    +---------------+  +------------+|  +--------+
+-----------+                                                   +-->|  Transform 3  +->|  Output 3  ++->|  Done  |
|  Input 5  ++                                                  |   +---------------+  +------------+|  +--------+
+-----------+|  +-------------+   +-----------+  +------------+ |                                    |
             +->|  Process 3  ++->|  Merge 2  +->|  Filter 2  +-+                                    |
             |  +-------------+|  +-----------+  +------------+ |                                    |
             |                 |                                |                                    |
             |                 |                                |   +---------------+  +------------+|
+-----------+|                 |                                +-->|  Transform 4  +->|  Output 4  ++
|  Input 6  ++                 |                                    +---------------+  +------------+
+-----------+   +-------------+|
             +->|  Process 4  ++
             |  +-------------+
             |
             |
+-----------+|
|  Input 7  ++
+-----------+|
             |
             |
             |
             |
+-----------+|
|  Input 8  ++
+-----------+
